content_blocks.text:
मूलत्रिकोण खनुहोच भागवर्वोत्तमानां दशवर्गजानाम् ।
संयोगजातोत्तमनामपूर्वा वैशेषिकांशा इति ते वदन्ति ॥ ४४ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मूलत्रिकोण खनुहोच भागवर्वोत्तमानां दशवर्गजानाम् ।
संयोगजातोत्तमनामपूर्वा वैशेषिकांशा इति ते वदन्ति ॥ ४४ ॥

content_blocks.text:
They (wisemen) say that Vaises-
hikamsas or parts of great excellence commence with
Uttama (vide next sloka) which is produced by the
combination (of the special characteristics) of Moola-
thrikona, Swakshetra, Swochcha, Swa Vargottama
arising from the ten vargas.

verse_data.translation:
They (wisemen) say that Vaises-
hikamsas or parts of great excellence commence with
Uttama (vide next sloka) which is produced by the
combination (of the special characteristics) of Moola-
thrikona, Swakshetra, Swochcha, Swa Vargottama
arising from the ten vargas.

content_blocks.text:
If planets be in their Moolatrikona, Swakshetra, Uccha
or Vargottama positions and have other benefic positions arising
from the Dasa Vargas, then, Uttama and other Vaiseshikamsas
referred to in the next two and a half slokas will result and do
immense good to the owner of the horoscope.

उत्तमं तु त्रिवगैंक्यं चातुर्वर्गन्तु गोपुरम् ।
वर्गपञ्चक्रसंयोम सिंहासनमिहोच्यते ।। ४५ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
उत्तमं तु त्रिवगैंक्यं चातुर्वर्गन्तु गोपुरम् ।
वर्गपञ्चक्रसंयोम सिंहासनमिहोच्यते ।। ४५ ॥

content_blocks.text:
वर्गद्वयं मॉरिजातं षण्णां पारावतांशकः ।
सप्तमं देवलोकः स्यादष्टमं च तथा भवेत् ॥ ४६ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
वर्गद्वयं मॉरिजातं षण्णां पारावतांशकः ।
सप्तमं देवलोकः स्यादष्टमं च तथा भवेत् ॥ ४६ ॥

content_blocks.text: ऐरावर्त तु नक्कै फलं तेषां पृथक पृथक् ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text: ऐरावर्त तु नक्कै फलं तेषां पृथक पृथक् ।

content_blocks.text:
The union of three vargas is
called Uttama. Four vargas combined constitute a Gopura.
The combination of five vargas is called Simhasana.
Two vargas united form Parijata. The union of six
vargas is called Paravathamsa. When a seventh varga
is added to the Paravathamsa, tha combination be-
comes Devaloka. A eighth varga joined to the seven
spoken of already will make the combination Devaloka
likewise. The combination of 9 Vargas is Iravatha.
The effects of the combinations are distinct and separate

verse_data.translation:
The union of three vargas is
called Uttama. Four vargas combined constitute a Gopura.
The combination of five vargas is called Simhasana.
Two vargas united form Parijata. The union of six
vargas is called Paravathamsa. When a seventh varga
is added to the Paravathamsa, tha combination be-
comes Devaloka. A eighth varga joined to the seven
spoken of already will make the combination Devaloka
likewise. The combination of 9 Vargas is Iravatha.
The effects of the combinations are distinct and separate

raw_text:
S1. 44-46
प्रथमोऽध्यायः
29
मूलत्रिकोण खनुहोच भागवर्वोत्तमानां दशवर्गजानाम् ।
संयोगजातोत्तमनामपूर्वा वैशेषिकांशा इति ते वदन्ति ॥ ४४ ॥
Sloka. 44. They (wisemen) say that Vaises-
hikamsas or parts of great excellence commence with
Uttama (vide next sloka) which is produced by the
combination (of the special characteristics) of Moola-
thrikona, Swakshetra, Swochcha, Swa Vargottama
arising from the ten vargas.
NOTES
If planets be in their Moolatrikona, Swakshetra, Uccha
or Vargottama positions and have other benefic positions arising
from the Dasa Vargas, then, Uttama and other Vaiseshikamsas
referred to in the next two and a half slokas will result and do
immense good to the owner of the horoscope.
उत्तमं तु त्रिवगैंक्यं चातुर्वर्गन्तु गोपुरम् ।
वर्गपञ्चक्रसंयोम सिंहासनमिहोच्यते ।। ४५ ॥
वर्गद्वयं मॉरिजातं षण्णां पारावतांशकः ।
सप्तमं देवलोकः स्यादष्टमं च तथा भवेत् ॥ ४६ ॥
ऐरावर्त तु नक्कै फलं तेषां पृथक पृथक् ।
Slokas. 45-46½. The union of three vargas is
called Uttama. Four vargas combined constitute a Gopura.
The combination of five vargas is called Simhasana.
Two vargas united form Parijata. The union of six
vargas is called Paravathamsa. When a seventh varga
is added to the Paravathamsa, tha combination be-
comes Devaloka. A eighth varga joined to the seven
spoken of already will make the combination Devaloka
likewise. The combination of 9 Vargas is Iravatha.
The effects of the combinations are distinct and separate
